creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #20)
> Depth 5? You mean 2.
No, 5. Again, please take a meticulous look at the end of comment #15:
> But in fact, we need depth 5 because of logs are stored not only in
> '${POUDRIERE_DATA}/logs/bulk/<jail>', but in 
> '${POUDRIERE_DATA}/logs/bulk/latest-per-pkg/<pkgname>/<pkgversion>/<jail>.log'
